_S35_NOTE: S35 P0 — 1v1 join bootstrap deadlock fix. User-reported bug at S35 boot. Root cause: main.ts:onJoinAttempt sets world.isHost=false but not world.gameMode='1v1', causing render-loop gate at main.ts:765 to skip clientSync.interpolateInto forever (gate requires gameMode='1v1'). Joiner stuck in LOBBY while host transitions to PLAYING. PRIME-AUDIT pedantic pass swept all 11 gameMode==='1v1' sites — zero misfires in post-fix interim state. Git blame: gate at main.ts:765 introduced commit add497f (S15 P2) — bug ~20 sessions old, explains 'brother retest pending' carry items.
